filesModified.purpose: Added iconSlug attribute (type: string) for suggested social media icon slugs

Replaced MediaUpload/ImageDropUploader/MediaReplaceFlow with IconPicker pattern from FooterInfoSocialItem. Added 12 SVG ReactComponent imports and suggestedIcons array. Removed InspectorControls Media panel and toolbar MediaReplaceFlow/trash buttons. Added iconSlug attribute to type. Computes iconPickerValue from iconSlug (priority) or logoId.

Added iconSlug to docblock. Added icon resolution block: iconSlug loads SVG from resources/ (priority), falls back to logoId via theme_output_svg_or_img. Output wrapped in phpcs:ignore for trusted SVG sources.

attributesAdded.name: iconSlug
attributesAdded.description: Slug identifier for a suggested social media icon SVG. When set, loads SVG from resources/icon-{slug}.svg. Takes priority over logoId.

syncStatus.notes: Root wrapper mismatch warnings (TSX fragment vs PHP li) are pre-existing and expected for this block pattern — the TSX wraps in BlockControls fragment while PHP emits the li directly.

testPage.notes: Existing test page preserved unchanged — 31 takt/wide-social-media-item instances across 9 demo containers. No structural changes needed.

fixesApplied: Replaced MediaUpload/ImageDropUploader/MediaReplaceFlow icon approach with IconPicker component
Copied 12 SVG icon files to WideSocialMediaItem/resources/
Added iconSlug resolution in PHP (priority over logoId)
Removed MediaReplaceFlow and trash toolbar buttons
Maintained backward compatibility for existing logoId values
